title: pohlana
intro: Pohlana plant, also known as 'Solanum aviculare', is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia, characterized by its edible leaves and purple flowers. The pohlana plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. It is also valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Pohlana leaves are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
